ksa_text: Test and validate analytical outputs and data pipelines, including creating testing procedures, developing automated test frameworks, performing quality assurance, and verifying that analytical results are accurate and reproducible.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of data classification standards and methodologies based on sensitivity and other risk factors.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Applied Analytics & BI is a primary or secondary domain for the Director of Data Products. This task KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (director).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Applied Analytics & BI), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Framework signal is weak (composite 0.423). External validation of this task KSA for the Director of Data Products role relies primarily on domain-level alignment rather than specific framework matches.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Gartner analytics maturity model and BI leadership surveys confirm applied analytics and BI competencies for analytics leadership.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: domain-level relevance of Applied Analytics & BI for the Director of Data Products is corroborated by DAMA-DMBOK, CDO survey data, and role-specific job market analysis, despite weak cross-framework signal.

decision_rationale: Applied Analytics & BI task KSA is within scope for the Director of Data Products at the director tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
